tagline: Zero to 45k followers - and a community that actually buys.
description: StyleSphere launched with a great product and a 2,000-follower Instagram account that was gaining nothing. In 90 days we built an audience of 45,000 engaged followers and turned social into their second-largest revenue channel.
challenge: StyleSphere had been posting inconsistently - three times a week on a good week - with no defined visual identity, no Reels strategy, and zero influencer infrastructure. Their engagement rate was below 1% and organic reach had cratered after a period of inactivity. The founder was spending 10+ hours a week on content that wasn't converting.
solution: We started with a brand voice and visual system audit, establishing a content OS that the team could maintain beyond the engagement. A Reels-first content calendar was built around three content pillars: styling education, behind-the-scenes brand story, and social proof. We executed a micro-influencer seeding campaign across 18 creators in the 10k–80k range, negotiating usage rights so the best-performing content could be repurposed as paid ads. Community management protocols were set up to respond to every comment within 2 hours during peak windows, tripling the engagement rate.

testimonial.quote: I was sceptical - everyone promises follower growth. growX delivered an audience that opens our DMs, leaves comments, and actually checks out. The revenue impact was real.
testimonial.author: Amara Diallo
testimonial.title: Creative Director, StyleSphere
